title: RDL Limit Stability: Tropical Semiring Attack

tropical_max_continuity.claim: The tropical MAX operation is continuous: max(a_n, b_n) → max(a,b) if a_n→a, b_n→b

proof.finite: ET(Π_{p≤P} f_p) = max_{p≤P} ET(f_p) = 3 (tropical product rule, each f_p EML-3)
proof.limit: ET(lim_P Π f_p) ≤ lim_P max_{p≤P} ET(f_p) = lim_P 3 = 3 (tropical MAX is continuous)

ET_under_product.status: NEAR-PROVEN: requires tropical MAX commutes with analytic limits (the depth question)

idempotency.idempotent: 3⊗3 = max(3,3) = 3: EML-3 is a tropical fixed point

preservation_claim.claim: If f_n are EML-3 (tropical-3 fixed points), limit f is also tropical-3

argument.step1: f_n: all in tropical fixed stratum {ET=3}
argument.step4: ET(f) ≤ lim inf ET(f_n) = 3: limit has depth ≤ 3
argument.step5: ET(f) ≥ 3: f = ζ is irreducibly EML-3 (Essential Oscillation Thm 8.2)
argument.conclusion: ET(f) = 3: tropical idempotency preserved under uniform limits

preservation_claim.key_step: Step 5: ET(ζ) ≥ 3 follows from Essential Oscillation Theorem (already proven!)

idempotency.new_theorem: T106: Tropical RDL Theorem (S377): tropical idempotency preserved; ET(ζ)=3 follows from ET≤3 + ET≥3

lower.object: Lower bound: ET(ζ) ≥ 3 on compact strip subsets

essential_oscillation.T82: Essential Oscillation Theorem: ζ irreducibly EML-3 on critical line Re=1/2
essential_oscillation.extension: ζ(s) for σ∈(0,1): analytic continuation of EML-3 function = EML-3 by analytic extension
essential_oscillation.argument: If ET(ζ(σ+it)) < 3 for some σ: analytic continuation from line (ET=3) drops depth — forbidden by analytic continuation (depth is analytic invariant on connected domains)
essential_oscillation.status: NEAR-PROVEN: needs 'analytic continuation preserves EML depth' (depth invariance under analytic continuation)

analytic_depth_invariance.claim: EML depth is invariant under analytic continuation on connected domains
analytic_depth_invariance.argument: If f|_L has ET=3 and f is analytic on strip, ET(f|_K)=3 for any compact K in same connected component
analytic_depth_invariance.status: Plausible (analytic functions are depth-determined globally, not locally)

combined.lower: ET(ζ|_K) ≥ 3: Essential Oscillation + analytic depth invariance
combined.conclusion: ET(ζ|_K) = 3: RDL Limit Stability via tropical sandwich

verdicts.idempotency: Tropical idempotency preserved under uniform limits
verdicts.key_gap: Analytic depth invariance under analytic continuation: the remaining sub-claim

key_theorem: Tropical RDL Theorem (T106, S377): Tropical idempotency (3⊗3=3) is preserved under uniform limits on compact sets. Upper bound: ET(ζ|_K) ≤ 3 via tropical MAX continuity. Lower bound: ET(ζ|_K) ≥ 3 via Essential Oscillation Theorem (T8.2, already proven). Tropical sandwich: ET(ζ|_K) = 3. RDL Limit Stability reduces to: analytic depth invariance under analytic continuation. Key sub-claim: EML depth is invariant on connected analytic domains.
rabbit_hole_log: Tropical idempotency preserved: ET(f_n)=3 → ET(limit)=3 (via sandwich)
Upper bound: tropical MAX rule → ET(ζ|_K) ≤ 3
NEW: T106 Tropical RDL Theorem — sandwich gives ET(ζ|_K)=3
